name: Insurance News API to CRM
description: Automates the process of fetching insurance-related news articles from an external API and forwarding them to a Customer Relationship Management (CRM) system for further processing.

docs.summary: This workflow automatically retrieves insurance-related news articles via an external API and forwards them to a CRM system for processing. The webhook node acts as the trigger to initiate this process.

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.comment: liest insurance-relevanten News-Artikel von der API und sendet sie zur CRM-verarbeitung.
